notes: Methicillin is derived from cefoxitine then oxacilline; cefoxitine is retained on discordance. Current data appears not to contain cefoxitine for S. aureus, so this is currently numerically equivalent to oxacilline alone.

Canonical phenotype indicator. Published as annual global proportion only. A strain is counted positive only when the final phenotype status is positive. Negative, unknown and no_signal map to FALSE.
